prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: **主角视觉描述提示词：**

Shinji Ikari, male teenager, full-body character design, anime style, Japanese animation art style, vibrant colors. Extremely handsome young man with delicate facial features, clear pale skin, and outstanding temperament. Deep blue short hair styled naturally, beautiful large eyes with a melancholic and slightly timid expression, refined nose and soft lips. Slender and lean physique with graceful proportions. Wearing white dress shirt under dark navy school uniform jacket, dark pants, clean and neat appearance. Slightly hunched posture showing introverted personality, delicate fingers, gentle and vulnerable aura. Handsome attractive face with beautiful delicate features and clear skin. Standing centered on pure white background, full-body view, Japanese anime character design style, high quality illustration, no text, no symbols, no words.

碇真嗣，男性少年，全身角色设计，动漫风格。颜值极高的清秀少年，五官精致，皮肤细腻白皙，气质出众而忧郁。深蓝色短发自然垂落，大眼睛透露着忧郁和略显怯懦的神情，精致的鼻梁，柔和的唇线。身材瘦削纤细，比例优美。穿着白色衬衫配深色校服外套，深色长裤，整体着装整洁。姿态略显驼背，体现内向性格，手指纤细，散发着温和而脆弱的气息。纯白背景，人物居中站立，日式动画风格，色彩鲜明，禁止任何文字符号。, very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.

side.prompt:

No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.

back.prompt:

No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
